zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Calveley於1456年出生在英國爾麗婭 白 南特維其時，他的父親Hugh Calveley17歲，母親Christiana Cottingham19歲。他於大約1481年與Elizabeth Dutton在英國英格蘭爾麗婭 白 南特維其結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1538年5月在他的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在英國爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Calveley于1456年出生在英国爾麗婭 白 南特維其时，他的父亲Hugh Calveley17岁，母亲Christiana Cottingham19岁。他于大约1481年与Elizabeth Dutton在英国英格兰爾麗婭 白 南特維其结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1538年5月在他的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在英国爾。

nameMeanings.name: Calveley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Calverley
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): habitational name from Calverley in Yorkshire, named with Old English calfra (genitive plural of calf ‘calf’) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Alternatively, in some instances the name may be a variant of the habitational name Calveley, from a place so called in Cheshire (with the same meaning as above), or from Calverleigh in Devon, meaning ‘the clearing of the bare wood’ (Old English calu ‘bare, bald’ + wudu ‘wood’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’).

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Calveley was born in 1456, in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, his father, Hugh Calveley, was 17 and his mother, Christiana Cottingham, was 19. He married Elizabeth Dutton about 1481, in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. He died in May 1538, in his hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Calveley est né en 1456, à Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Calveley, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Christiana Cottingham, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Dutton environ 1481, à Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1538, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Calveley 1456 in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Calveley 17 und seine Mutter Christiana Cottingham 19. Er hat um 1481 in Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Dutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1538 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Calveley è nato il nel 1456 nel Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh Calveley, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Christiana Cottingham, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Dutton circa 1481, nel Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Calveley(이)가 1456년 영국 체실르 리아 비 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Calveley(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Christiana Cottingham(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 리아 비 난트위치에서 Elizabeth Dutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1538년 5월 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Calveley nasceu em 1456, em Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Calveley, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Christiana Cottingham, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Dutton aproximadamente 1481, em Lea by Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1538, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Lea, Cheshire, England: леа би баккфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Calveley родился в 1456 г. в местности леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh Calveley было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Christiana Cottingham, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Dutton около 1481 г. в местности леа би нантвич, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Он умер май 1538 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности чешир, Англия.
